sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53020" key="kampuloeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καμπῠλο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n53020.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">appearingcrooked</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φαντασία</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1121c</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
